_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop and maintain target profiles using appropriate corporate tools and databases (e.g. Target associations, activities, communication infrastructures, etc.).
reference_document_element_description: Establish and maintain the enterprise data catalog, business glossary, and metadata management program, ensuring discoverability, lineage visibility, and classification currency.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-003 (TF, cosine: 0.528), DQ-T-008 (DQ, cosine: 0.526).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.544). Shared vocabulary: [maintain]. DCWF-only terms [activities, appropriate, associations, communication, corporate, databases] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, catalog, classification, currency, data, discoverability] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.854 (P=0.846, R=0.863). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (69.9%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Develop and maintain target profiles using appropriate corporate tools and datab" and "Establish and maintain the enterprise data catalog, business glossary, and metad". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.529 ≈ STS 0.544 (gap 0.016). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [maintain] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.1%. Shared tokens: [maintain]. DCWF-only: [activities, appropriate, associations, communication, corporate, databases]. WIDAI-only: [business, catalog, classification, currency, data, discoverability].
